hero.title: Manju KC
hero.subtitle: I help brands connect with their audience through authentic, data-driven marketing that feels human.

about.headline: Behind the Strategy
about.bio: I'm Manju — a marketer who believes the best brands feel like people, not corporations. Half my heart lives in Brisbane, the other in Bhaktapur, and somewhere in between I found my voice as a storyteller.
about.philosophy: Marketing isn't about selling. It's about connecting — one honest story at a time.
about.story: My journey started with a simple question: why do some brands feel like friends while others feel like noise? That question became a career. From small shops in Bhaktapur to founders in Brisbane, I've helped people turn what they love into stories the world wants to hear. I've learned that strategy matters, but warmth is what people remember.

experience.story: Partnering with founders and small teams to build marketing that sounds like them, not like a template.
Led campaigns that grew quiet brands into communities people actually wanted to be part of.

services.title: Brand Strategy & Positioning
services.description: We'll find the words and feelings that make your brand unmistakably you — then build a story everyone remembers.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.description: Calm, consistent, beautiful content that grows a community — without the burnout or the bots.

services.title: Content Creation & Campaigns
services.description: Photography, copy, and campaigns crafted to make people stop scrolling and start feeling.

services.title: Email Marketing Automation
services.description: Warm, human emails that land like a note from a friend — and quietly grow your revenue.

services.title: Marketing Consulting
services.description: A thinking partner for founders who want clarity, confidence, and a plan that actually fits.

portfolio.title: Lumen Skincare
portfolio.description: A soft, luminous relaunch that turned a quiet skincare label into a daily ritual.
portfolio.challenge: Lumen had a beautiful product but a forgettable presence. We needed to make people feel something before they read a single ingredient.
portfolio.strategy: We built the campaign around real morning routines — soft light, honest skin, and words that sounded like a friend. Every asset was shot at golden hour.

testimonial.quote: Manju didn't just market our product. She introduced us to ourselves.
testimonial.name: Aria L.

portfolio.title: Bhaktapur Brews
portfolio.description: A community-first social presence for a neighbourhood coffee roaster.
portfolio.challenge: A beloved local cafe was invisible online. Regulars loved it; newcomers never found it.
portfolio.strategy: We told the story of the people behind the counter — their hands, their rituals, their warmth — one Reel at a time.

testimonial.quote: Our little cafe now feels like a movement. Customers call it home.
testimonial.name: Ravi S.

portfolio.title: Wanderwell Travel
portfolio.description: An editorial content engine for a boutique travel brand with a soul.
portfolio.challenge: Wanderwell had trips worth dreaming about but a blog nobody read and emails nobody opened.
portfolio.strategy: We rebuilt their voice around slow travel and real moments, then structured a content system their team could actually sustain.

testimonial.quote: Manju gave our brand a heartbeat. Our readers finally feel us.
testimonial.name: Mei T.

portfolio.title: Verdant Wellness
portfolio.description: A gentle email journey that turned browsers into a loyal, returning community.
portfolio.challenge: Verdant's list was growing but silent. Beautiful products, abandoned carts, no connection.
portfolio.strategy: We replaced promotions with letters — warm welcome sequences, honest stories, and offers that felt like gifts.

testimonial.quote: Our open rates tripled and, more importantly, so did our trust.
testimonial.name: Noa K.

blog.title: Why the Best Marketing Feels Like a Friend
blog.excerpt: People don't fall in love with features. They fall in love with how a brand makes them feel at 9pm on a Tuesday.
blog.content:
The brands we love don't shout. They listen. They show up consistently, say things honestly, and leave room for us to belong. In this piece I share the small shifts that turn marketing from noise into relationship — and why your audience can feel the difference instantly.

When a brand feels like a friend, every touchpoint becomes a conversation. The subject line feels like a wave. The caption feels like a confession. The product arrives like a gift. That's the whole game, really: be someone worth talking to.

blog.title: Quiet Brands, Loud Love
blog.excerpt: You don't need to be the loudest in the room. You need to be the most real.
blog.content:
A study in restraint: how small brands with a clear soul outshine bigger, louder competitors. Featuring three real examples and the exact words that made them stick.

Restraint is a love language. When you say less, the right people hear more. The brands that win quiet loyalty are the ones brave enough to whisper.

blog.title: Reels That Don't Feel Like Ads
blog.excerpt: The secret to scroll-stopping video isn't production value. It's permission to be a person.
blog.content:
A practical, warm guide to making short video that people actually finish. No trend-chasing, no cringe — just stories worth watching.

The camera loves honesty. The moment you stop performing and start sharing, people lean in. Here are the three shot types I use in every single campaign.

blog.title: Three Sentences That Sell Without Selling
blog.excerpt: A tiny framework for copy that connects before it converts.
blog.content:
Most copy tries too hard. Here are three sentence shapes I use in every campaign to build trust first and urgency last.

Sentence one names the feeling. Sentence two tells the truth. Sentence three offers a hand. That's it — and it works every time.
